scope: Apply-gated GitHub transport for the fresh same-run Tau COMPLIANCE command-loop terminal handoff

commands.summary: Rendered dry-run GitHub issue create command targeting grahama1970/tau with labels agent-work,next:human,executor:human.
Posted proof-disposition comment to the proof-only issue.

commands.command: gh issue edit 17 --repo grahama1970/tau --remove-label next:human --add-label agent-done
commands.summary: Removed the active next:human queue label and added agent-done.

commands.command: gh issue close 17 --repo grahama1970/tau --comment 'Closing proof-only Tau transport issue after evidence capture.'
commands.summary: Closed the proof-only issue after evidence capture.

proves: The terminal next:human handoff from the fresh same-run COMPLIANCE command-loop receipt can be applied to GitHub as a real issue in grahama1970/tau.
The applied issue carried the expected queue labels agent-work,next:human,executor:human at creation.
The proof-only issue was commented, relabeled to remove next:human, and closed after evidence capture.
does_not_prove: Autonomous multi-step issue handling after creation.
Semantic correctness of the COMPLIANCE evidence case.
GitHub Actions or cron handling this exact issue after creation.
A human-approved final route after the next:human stop.
